entity_data.publication_caption: Craque, artilheiro e decisivo! 🇨🇴🇧🇷 14 gols no ano, segundo atleta com mais minutos em campo no mundo em 2024 e autor dos dois gols do título da @conmebolrecopa! Jhon Arias ❤️💚
Último treino no Rio para a @copinha! Vamos, #MlksDeXerém! 🇭🇺🇭🇺 📸: Marina Garcia/FFC
🔊 Ambiente barulhento: os níveis de som atingiram MUITOS decibéis.
Gustavos prontos pra @copinha! Dohmann e Cintra dividem a responsabilidade de liderar os #MlksDeXerém!  Tem mais no link dos stories!

VITÓRIA É MUUUITO FLUMINENSE! Porta do hotel lotada pra receber o #TimeDeGuerreiros, como sempre! Mais tarde, a partir de 19h, tem #TricolorEmTodaTerra! Garanta seu ingresso >> fluminense.futebolcard.com

INFORMAÇÕES DE INGRESSOS PARA BOTAFOGO X FLUMINENSE, NO NILTON SANTOS! Todas as informações no nosso site! ⏰ As vendas para @sociodoflu abrem hoje, às 14h, em botafogo.com.br/ingresso.  💻 As vendas para o público geral abrem na segunda-feira, às 12h, em botafogo.com.br/ingresso. 📍 A torcida Tricolor ficará localizada nos setores sul e oeste inferior. 🚨 Todos os torcedores que comprarem ingresso pela internet, através da plataforma de venda de ingressos do Botafogo deverão acessar o estádio Nilton Santos com a biometria facial. Confira o passo a passo em nosso site!
VEEEEENCEEEE O FLUMINEEEENSEEEE! Com gols de Vagno e João Lourenço, os #MlksDeXerém vencem o Linense na @copinha! VAMOOSSS! #VemQueTem 🇭🇺🇭🇺🇭🇺
Fechamos a preparação! Amanhã tem FLUMINENSE FOOTBALL CLUB em Cariacica!  📸: @lucasmerconphotos/FFC

The image shows a man and a baby standing together indoors, likely in a hotel room or similar setting. The man is wearing a dark polo shirt with the logo "Umbro" and the text "Superbet" on it. He has short, dark hair and is smiling while making a peace sign with his right hand. The baby, dressed in a white sports jersey with green and red accents, is being held by the man. The baby appears to be looking at something off-camera.

In the background, there is a table with various items, including a plate of food, a kettle, and some other small objects. The room has a neutral color scheme with beige walls and a dark-colored door or partition. The overall atmosphere seems casual and relaxed.

entity_data.img_caption: The image shows a group of people gathered outdoors, likely at an event or gathering. The central figure is a man wearing a teal cap and sunglasses, with tattoos on his arms. He is taking a selfie with a woman who is smiling and pointing towards something off-camera. The woman is wearing a light blue top and bright pink shorts. In the background, there are other people, some of whom are also taking photos or looking in the same direction as the man. The setting appears to be a street or park area, with trees and buildings visible in the distance. The overall atmosphere seems lively and social.

The image shows a person sitting inside a vehicle, likely a bus or train, given the window and curtains visible in the background. The individual is wearing a dark-colored sports jersey with red and white accents, featuring the logo of Fluminense Football Club on the chest. The jersey also has the word "Superbet" printed on it.

In their hands, the person is holding a box and a card. The box is predominantly green with red and white text, and it prominently displays the word "Fluminense." The card they are holding has the same branding as the box, with additional text that reads "Rumo à Vitória!" which translates to "On the Way to Victory!" in English. The card also includes some text in Portuguese, indicating that it might be related to a promotional or commemorative item for the Fluminense football club.

The overall setting suggests that the person might be a fan or supporter of Fluminense Football Club, possibly attending a match or event related to the team. The presence of the branded items indicates a connection to the club's merchandise or a special event.

The image depicts two soccer players on a field, engaged in a training session. The player in the foreground is wearing a white sleeveless jersey with green accents and the word "Superior" printed on it. He is also wearing green shorts and white soccer shoes with black laces. His socks are green with orange bands at the top. He appears to be dribbling or controlling a soccer ball, which is positioned near his feet.

The second player, slightly behind and to the right of the first, is wearing a light green sleeveless jersey with the word "Umbro" printed on it. He is also wearing green shorts and white soccer shoes with black laces. His socks are green with orange bands at the top. He has a beard and is looking towards the ball.

The background features a red brick wall with a white section above it and a green section below it, indicating that they are likely on a sports facility or training ground. The grass on the field is well-maintained, and there are no other players or objects visible in the immediate vicinity.

The image shows an older man wearing a maroon sports jersey with the word "SUPERBET" prominently displayed across the chest. He is also wearing a matching maroon cap. The background appears to be a sports field, likely a soccer or football field, given the context of the jersey and the setting. The man seems to be engaged in some activity related to sports, possibly coaching or training. The overall scene suggests a professional or semi-professional sports environment.

The image shows a person wearing a sleeveless sports jersey. The jersey is predominantly green with some orange accents around the collar and shoulders. The brand logo on the left side of the chest reads "Umbro Training," indicating that the jersey is likely used for training purposes. The right side of the chest features a crest or emblem, which appears to be associated with a sports team or organization. The word "SUPERBET" is printed across the front of the jersey in bold, black letters. The background is blurred but suggests an outdoor setting, possibly a sports field or stadium.

The image depicts a soccer player in action on a field. The player is wearing a green and orange sports kit, which includes a short-sleeved jersey and shorts. The jersey has a logo on the left chest area, and the shorts have a similar design with a logo on the right leg. The player is also wearing bright pink soccer cleats and green socks with an orange trim.

The player is in the process of heading a soccer ball, which is positioned above their head. The ball appears to be in motion, suggesting that the player is actively engaging in a drill or practice session. The image depicts a soccer player in action on a field. The player is wearing a white and green training kit, which includes a sleeveless top with long sleeves underneath, green shorts, and pink soccer shoes. The player's socks are also pink, matching the shoes. The player is mid-kick, with one foot raised and the other foot planted on the ground, indicating a dynamic movement.
